summary: London session open range breakout. Asian range (00:00-07:00 GMT) defines the channel. Entry on first H1 bar closing outside the range during London open (07:00-10:00 GMT). Stop = opposite side of range. Target = 1.5x range. Exit = SL, TP, or 17:00 GMT EOD.

period_b.note: 2020 data absent from CSVs — data starts 2021

parameter_scan_notes.tp_1.0_no_filter: PASS both periods. OOS PF 1.345/1.683. More trades (569/451).
parameter_scan_notes.tp_1.5_no_filter: PASS both periods. OOS PF 1.283/1.850. CHOSEN as optimal.
parameter_scan_notes.tp_2.0_no_filter: FAIL Period A (DSR gate). Period B passes. RR too high for IS sample.
parameter_scan_notes.trend_filter_on: FAIL Period A (halves trade count, DSR gate fails). Not recommended.
parameter_scan_notes.conclusion: No trend filter needed. Market itself filters via Asian range boundaries.

next_steps: 1. Forward test on 2025 data (partially in EURUSD_H1_2021-2025.csv)
3. Port to MQL5 EA: detect Asian range, enter on London open breakout, ATR-sized lot
4. Submit to prop firm after 3+ months forward test with consistent results
